trans-unit.source: Name of the SQL Server instance
trans-unit.target: Name of the SQL Server instance

trans-unit.source: The name of the initial catalog or database in the data source
trans-unit.target: The name of the initial catalog or database in the data source

trans-unit.source: Specifies the method of authenticating with SQL Server
trans-unit.target: Specifies the method of authenticating with SQL Server

trans-unit.source: Microsoft Entra ID - Universal with MFA support
trans-unit.target: Microsoft Entra ID - Universal with MFA support

trans-unit.source: Indicates the user ID to be used when connecting to the data source
trans-unit.target: Indicates the user ID to be used when connecting to the data source

trans-unit.source: Indicates the password to be used when connecting to the data source
trans-unit.target: Indicates the password to be used when connecting to the data source

trans-unit.source: Declares the application workload type when connecting to a server
trans-unit.target: Declares the application workload type when connecting to a server

trans-unit.source: The SQL Server language record name
trans-unit.target: The SQL Server language record name

trans-unit.source: Enables or disables Always Encrypted for the connection
trans-unit.target: Enables or disables Always Encrypted for the connection

trans-unit.source: Specifies a protocol for attesting a server-side enclave used with Always Encrypted with secure enclaves
trans-unit.target: Specifies a protocol for attesting a server-side enclave used with Always Encrypted with secure enclaves

trans-unit.source: Specifies an endpoint for attesting a server-side enclave used with Always Encrypted with secure enclaves
trans-unit.target: Specifies an endpoint for attesting a server-side enclave used with Always Encrypted with secure enclaves

trans-unit.source: When set, SQL Server uses provided setting for SSL encryption for all data sent between the client and server.
trans-unit.target: When set, SQL Server uses provided setting for SSL encryption for all data sent between the client and server.

trans-unit.source: When false, security-sensitive information, such as the password, is not returned as part of the connection
trans-unit.target: When false, security-sensitive information, such as the password, is not returned as part of the connection

trans-unit.source: When true (and encrypt=true), SQL Server uses SSL encryption for all data sent between the client and server without validating the server certificate
trans-unit.target: When true (and encrypt=true), SQL Server uses SSL encryption for all data sent between the client and server without validating the server certificate

trans-unit.source: Specifies host name in certificate to be used for certificate validation, when encryption is enabled.
trans-unit.target: Specifies host name in certificate to be used for certificate validation, when encryption is enabled.

trans-unit.source: The name of the primary file, including the full path name, of an attachable database
trans-unit.target: The name of the primary file, including the full path name, of an attachable database

trans-unit.source: When true, indicates the connection should be from the SQL server context. Available only when running in the SQL Server process
trans-unit.target: When true, indicates the connection should be from the SQL server context. Available only when running in the SQL Server process

trans-unit.source: Number of attempts to restore connection
trans-unit.target: Number of attempts to restore connection

trans-unit.source: Delay between attempts to restore connection
trans-unit.target: Delay between attempts to restore connection

trans-unit.source: The name of the workstation connecting to SQL Server
trans-unit.target: The name of the workstation connecting to SQL Server

trans-unit.source: When true, the connection object is drawn from the appropriate pool, or if necessary, is created and added to the appropriate pool
trans-unit.target: When true, the connection object is drawn from the appropriate pool, or if necessary, is created and added to the appropriate pool

trans-unit.source: The maximum number of connections allowed in the pool
trans-unit.target: The maximum number of connections allowed in the pool

trans-unit.source: The minimum number of connections allowed in the pool
trans-unit.target: The minimum number of connections allowed in the pool

trans-unit.source: The minimum amount of time (in seconds) for this connection to live in the pool before being destroyed
trans-unit.target: The minimum amount of time (in seconds) for this connection to live in the pool before being destroyed

trans-unit.source: Used by SQL Server in Replication
trans-unit.target: Used by SQL Server in Replication

trans-unit.source: the name or network address of the instance of SQL Server that acts as a failover partner
trans-unit.target: the name or network address of the instance of SQL Server that acts as a failover partner

trans-unit.source: When true, multiple result sets can be returned and read from one connection
trans-unit.target: When true, multiple result sets can be returned and read from one connection

trans-unit.source: Size in bytes of the network packets used to communicate with an instance of SQL Server
trans-unit.target: Size in bytes of the network packets used to communicate with an instance of SQL Server

trans-unit.source: Indicates which server type system then provider will expose through the DataReader
trans-unit.target: Indicates which server type system then provider will expose through the DataReader

trans-unit.source: OwnerUri cannot be null or empty
trans-unit.target: OwnerUri cannot be null or empty

trans-unit.source: SpecifiedUri '{0}' does not have existing connection
trans-unit.target: SpecifiedUri '{0}' does not have existing connection

trans-unit.source: Specified URI '{0}' does not have a default connection
trans-unit.target: Specified URI '{0}' does not have a default connection

trans-unit.source: Invalid value '{0}' for AuthenticationType. Valid values are 'Integrated' and 'SqlLogin'.
trans-unit.target: Invalid value '{0}' for AuthenticationType. Valid values are 'Integrated' and 'SqlLogin'.

trans-unit.source: Invalid value '{0}' for ComlumEncryption. Valid values are 'Enabled' and 'Disabled'.
trans-unit.target: Invalid value '{0}' for ComlumEncryption. Valid values are 'Enabled' and 'Disabled'.

trans-unit.source: Invalid value '{0}' for Secure enclaves. Valid values are 'Enabled' and 'Disabled'.
trans-unit.target: Invalid value '{0}' for Secure enclaves. Valid values are 'Enabled' and 'Disabled'.

trans-unit.source: Invalid value '{0}' for Encrypt. Valid values are 'Optional', 'Mandatory', 'Strict', 'True', 'False', 'Yes' and 'No'.
trans-unit.target: Invalid value '{0}' for Encrypt. Valid values are 'Optional', 'Mandatory', 'Strict', 'True', 'False', 'Yes' and 'No'.

trans-unit.source: Invalid value '{0}' for Attestation protocol. Valid values are 'AAS', 'HGS' and 'None'.
trans-unit.target: Invalid value '{0}' for Attestation protocol. Valid values are 'AAS', 'HGS' and 'None'.

trans-unit.source: Attestation protocol cannot be empty with Secure enclaves enabled.
trans-unit.target: Attestation protocol cannot be empty with Secure enclaves enabled.

trans-unit.source: Attestation URL cannot be empty with the selected value of Attestation protocol.
trans-unit.target: Attestation URL cannot be empty with the selected value of Attestation protocol.

trans-unit.source: The Attestation protocol and Attestation URL requires Always Encrypted with Secure enclaves to be set to Enabled.
trans-unit.target: The Attestation protocol and Attestation URL requires Always Encrypted with Secure enclaves to be set to Enabled.

trans-unit.source: The Attestation URL must not be specified with Attestation protocol 'None'. Either set appropriate Attestation protocol or remove Attestation URL from connection properties.
trans-unit.target: The Attestation URL must not be specified with Attestation protocol 'None'. Either set appropriate Attestation protocol or remove Attestation URL from connection properties.

trans-unit.source: Invalid value '{0}' for ApplicationIntent. Valid values are 'ReadWrite' and 'ReadOnly'.
trans-unit.target: Invalid value '{0}' for ApplicationIntent. Valid values are 'ReadWrite' and 'ReadOnly'.

trans-unit.source: Press OK to input a new password that is not empty.
trans-unit.target: Press OK to input a new password that is not empty.

trans-unit.source: Press OK to input a new password that meets operating system policy requirements.
trans-unit.target: Press OK to input a new password that meets operating system policy requirements.

trans-unit.source: Press OK to input a different password.
trans-unit.target: Press OK to input a different password.

trans-unit.source: OwnerUri cannot be null or empty
trans-unit.target: OwnerUri cannot be null or empty

trans-unit.source: Connection details object cannot be null
trans-unit.target: Connection details object cannot be null

trans-unit.source: ServerName cannot be null or empty
trans-unit.target: ServerName cannot be null or empty

trans-unit.source: {0} cannot be null or empty when using SqlLogin authentication
trans-unit.target: {0} cannot be null or empty when using SqlLogin authentication

trans-unit.source: The query has already completed, it cannot be cancelled
trans-unit.target: The query has already completed, it cannot be cancelled

trans-unit.source: Query successfully cancelled, failed to dispose query. Owner URI not found.
trans-unit.target: Query successfully cancelled, failed to dispose query. Owner URI not found.

trans-unit.source: The batch has not completed, yet
trans-unit.target: The batch has not completed, yet

trans-unit.source: Batch index cannot be less than 0 or greater than the number of batches
trans-unit.target: Batch index cannot be less than 0 or greater than the number of batches

trans-unit.source: Result set index cannot be less than 0 or greater than the number of result sets
trans-unit.target: Result set index cannot be less than 0 or greater than the number of result sets

trans-unit.source: Maximum number of bytes to return must be greater than zero
trans-unit.target: Maximum number of bytes to return must be greater than zero

trans-unit.source: Maximum number of chars to return must be greater than zero
trans-unit.target: Maximum number of chars to return must be greater than zero

trans-unit.source: Maximum number of XML bytes to return must be greater than zero
trans-unit.target: Maximum number of XML bytes to return must be greater than zero

trans-unit.source: FileStreamWrapper must be initialized before performing operations
trans-unit.target: FileStreamWrapper must be initialized before performing operations

trans-unit.source: This FileStreamWrapper cannot be used for writing
trans-unit.target: This FileStreamWrapper cannot be used for writing

trans-unit.note: . Parameters: 0 - msg (int), 1 - lvl (int), 2 - state (int), 3 - line (int), 4 - newLine (string), 5 - message (string)

trans-unit.source: The requested query does not exist
trans-unit.target: The requested query does not exist

trans-unit.source: Cannot connect to the database due to invalid OwnerUri
trans-unit.target: Cannot connect to the database due to invalid OwnerUri

trans-unit.source: A query is already in progress for this editor session. Please cancel this query or wait for its completion.
trans-unit.target: A query is already in progress for this editor session. Please cancel this query or wait for its completion.

trans-unit.source: Sender for OnInfoMessage event must be a SqlConnection
trans-unit.target: Sender for OnInfoMessage event must be a SqlConnection

trans-unit.source: Cannot add row to result buffer, data reader does not contain rows
trans-unit.target: Cannot add row to result buffer, data reader does not contain rows

trans-unit.source: Query has no results to return
trans-unit.target: Query has no results to return

trans-unit.source: Result set has too many rows to be safely loaded
trans-unit.target: Result set has too many rows to be safely loaded

trans-unit.source: The underlying type "{0}" for sql variant column "{1}" could not be resolved.
trans-unit.target: The underlying type "{0}" for sql variant column "{1}" could not be resolved.

trans-unit.source: Result cannot be saved until query execution has completed
trans-unit.target: Result cannot be saved until query execution has completed

trans-unit.source: Internal error occurred while starting save task
trans-unit.target: Internal error occurred while starting save task

trans-unit.source: A save request to the same path is in progress
trans-unit.target: A save request to the same path is in progress

trans-unit.source: Cannot read subset unless the results have been read from the server
trans-unit.target: Cannot read subset unless the results have been read from the server

trans-unit.source: Start row cannot be less than 0 or greater than the number of rows in the result set
trans-unit.target: Start row cannot be less than 0 or greater than the number of rows in the result set

trans-unit.source: Row count must be a positive integer
trans-unit.target: Row count must be a positive integer

trans-unit.source: Could not retrieve column schema for result set
trans-unit.target: Could not retrieve column schema for result set

trans-unit.source: Could not retrieve an execution plan from the result set
trans-unit.target: Could not retrieve an execution plan from the result set

trans-unit.source: An error was encountered during execution of batch. Exiting.
trans-unit.target: An error was encountered during execution of batch. Exiting.

trans-unit.source: {0} will be converted to a Microsoft.Data.SqlClient.SqlParameter object with the following properties: SqlDbType = {1}, Size = {2}, Precision = {3}, Scale = {4}, SqlValue = {5}
trans-unit.target: {0} will be converted to a Microsoft.Data.SqlClient.SqlParameter object with the following properties: SqlDbType = {1}, Size = {2}, Precision = {3}, Scale = {4}, SqlValue = {5}
trans-unit.note: . Parameters: 0 - variableName (string), 1 - sqlDbType (string), 2 - size (int), 3 - precision (int), 4 - scale (int), 5 - sqlValue (string)

trans-unit.source: Unable to convert {0} to a Microsoft.Data.SqlClient.SqlParameter object. The specified literal cannot be converted to {1}(Microsoft.Data.SqlDbType). Literal value: {2}
trans-unit.target: Unable to convert {0} to a Microsoft.Data.SqlClient.SqlParameter object. The specified literal cannot be converted to {1}(Microsoft.Data.SqlDbType). Literal value: {2}

trans-unit.source: Unable to convert {0} to a Microsoft.Data.SqlClient.SqlParameter object. The specified literal cannot be converted to {1}(Microsoft.Data.SqlDbType), as it used an unsupported date/time format. Use one of the supported date/time formats. Literal value: {2}
trans-unit.target: Unable to convert {0} to a Microsoft.Data.SqlClient.SqlParameter object. The specified literal cannot be converted to {1}(Microsoft.Data.SqlDbType), as it used an unsupported date/time format. Use one of the supported date/time formats. Literal value: {2}

trans-unit.source: Unable to convert {0} to a Microsoft.Data.SqlClient.SqlParameter object. The specified literal cannot be converted to {1}(Microsoft.Data.SqlDbType), as prefix 0x is expected for a binary literals. Literal value: {2}
trans-unit.target: Unable to convert {0} to a Microsoft.Data.SqlClient.SqlParameter object. The specified literal cannot be converted to {1}(Microsoft.Data.SqlDbType), as prefix 0x is expected for a binary literals. Literal value: {2}

trans-unit.target: The current script is too large for Parameterization for Always Encrypted, please disable Parameterization for Always Encrypted in Query Options (Query > Query Options > Execution > Advanced). Maximum allowable length: {0} characters, Current script length: {1} characters

trans-unit.target: An error was encountered while writing server contextualization scripts to the cache. Error: {0}

trans-unit.target: Failed to generate server contextualization scripts

trans-unit.target: An unexpected error occurred during Peek Definition execution: {0}

trans-unit.target: A object name must be provided

trans-unit.target: Explicitly specifying server or database is not supported

trans-unit.target: Database object {0} cannot be used for editing.

trans-unit.target: Query execution failed, see messages for details

trans-unit.source: Query did not generate exactly one result set
trans-unit.target: Query did not generate exactly one result set

trans-unit.source: Failed to add new row to update cache
trans-unit.target: Failed to add new row to update cache

trans-unit.source: Given row ID is outside the range of rows in the edit cache
trans-unit.target: Given row ID is outside the range of rows in the edit cache

trans-unit.source: An update is already pending for this row and must be reverted first
trans-unit.target: An update is already pending for this row and must be reverted first

trans-unit.target: Given row ID does not have pending update

trans-unit.source: Table or view metadata could not be found
trans-unit.target: Table or view metadata could not be found

trans-unit.target: Invalid format for column '{0}', column is defined as {1}

trans-unit.target: Allowed values for boolean columns are 0, 1, "true", or "false"

trans-unit.source: The column '{0}' is defined as NOT NULL but was not given a value
trans-unit.target: The column '{0}' is defined as NOT NULL but was not given a value

trans-unit.source: A delete is pending for this row, a cell update cannot be applied.
trans-unit.target: A delete is pending for this row, a cell update cannot be applied.

trans-unit.source: Column ID must be in the range of columns for the query
trans-unit.target: Column ID must be in the range of columns for the query

trans-unit.source: An output filename must be provided
trans-unit.target: An output filename must be provided

trans-unit.source: A commit task is in progress. Please wait for completion.
trans-unit.target: A commit task is in progress. Please wait for completion.

trans-unit.source: TIME column values must be between 00:00:00.0000000 and 23:59:59.9999999
trans-unit.target: TIME column values must be between 00:00:00.0000000 and 23:59:59.9999999

trans-unit.source: NULL is not allowed for this column
trans-unit.target: NULL is not allowed for this column

trans-unit.source: Value {0} is too large to fit in column of type {1}
trans-unit.target: Value {0} is too large to fit in column of type {1}

trans-unit.source: EditData queries targeting multiple tables are not supported
trans-unit.target: EditData queries targeting multiple tables are not supported

trans-unit.source: EditData queries with aliased columns are not supported
trans-unit.target: EditData queries with aliased columns are not supported

trans-unit.source: EditData queries with aggregate or expression columns are not supported
trans-unit.target: EditData queries with aggregate or expression columns are not supported

trans-unit.target: EditData queries with duplicate columns are not supported

trans-unit.source: EditData queries must query the originally targeted table '{0}'
trans-unit.target: EditData queries must query the originally targeted table '{0}'

trans-unit.target: An error occurred while the batch was being executed, but the error has been ignored.

trans-unit.target: Batch parser wrapper execution: {0} found... at line {1}: {2} Description: {3}

trans-unit.target: Exact numeric column is missing numeric precision or numeric scale

trans-unit.target: Column with length is missing size

trans-unit.source: Please provide a file path instead of directory path
trans-unit.target: Please provide a file path instead of directory path

trans-unit.source: Specifying this option when restoring a backup with the NORECOVERY option is not permitted.
trans-unit.target: Specifying this option when restoring a backup with the NORECOVERY option is not permitted.

trans-unit.target: No backupset selected to be restored

trans-unit.source: Unsupported device type {0} for engine edition {1}.
trans-unit.target: Unsupported device type {0} for engine edition {1}.

trans-unit.source: Cannot access the specified path on the server: {0}
trans-unit.target: Cannot access the specified path on the server: {0}

trans-unit.source: An XEvent session named {0} already exists
trans-unit.target: An XEvent session named {0} already exists

trans-unit.source: Create shared access signature is not supported for cloud instances.
trans-unit.target: Create shared access signature is not supported for cloud instances.

trans-unit.source: Cannot generate SAS URI for blob container.
trans-unit.target: Cannot generate SAS URI for blob container.

trans-unit.source: Failed storing shared access signature token on the SQL Servers.
trans-unit.target: Failed storing shared access signature token on the SQL Servers.

trans-unit.source: The object does no longer exist on server.
trans-unit.target: The object does no longer exist on server.

trans-unit.source: The current login does not have permissions to set the database owner to '{0}' The database was created successfully however.
trans-unit.target: The current login does not have permissions to set the database owner to '{0}' The database was created successfully however.

trans-unit.source: You must specify the Target Servers on which this multi server job will execute.
trans-unit.target: You must specify the Target Servers on which this multi server job will execute.

trans-unit.source: Proxy account '{0}' does not exist on the server.
trans-unit.target: Proxy account '{0}' does not exist on the server.

trans-unit.source: A job named '{0}' already exists. Enter a unique name for the job.
trans-unit.target: A job named '{0}' already exists. Enter a unique name for the job.

trans-unit.source: The name of the job step cannot be blank.
trans-unit.target: The name of the job step cannot be blank.

trans-unit.source: There is already a step named '{0}' for this job. You must specify a different name.
trans-unit.target: There is already a step named '{0}' for this job. You must specify a different name.

trans-unit.source: The name of the alert cannot be blank.
trans-unit.target: The name of the alert cannot be blank.

trans-unit.source: Select at least one day to be part of this weekly schedule.
trans-unit.target: Select at least one day to be part of this weekly schedule.

trans-unit.source: The job schedule starting date cannot be greater than the ending date.
trans-unit.target: The job schedule starting date cannot be greater than the ending date.

trans-unit.source: The job schedule starting time cannot be after the ending time.
trans-unit.target: The job schedule starting time cannot be after the ending time.

trans-unit.source: The job schedule ending time must be after the starting time.
trans-unit.target: The job schedule ending time must be after the starting time.

trans-unit.source: Start date must be on or after January 1, 1990.
trans-unit.target: Start date must be on or after January 1, 1990.

trans-unit.source: There is already a schedule named '{0}' for this job. You must specify a different name.
trans-unit.target: There is already a schedule named '{0}' for this job. You must specify a different name.

trans-unit.note: Exception thrown when job server is not available

trans-unit.source: Path {0} is not a valid directory
trans-unit.target: Path {0} is not a valid directory

trans-unit.source: For directory {0} a file with name {1} already exist
trans-unit.target: For directory {0} a file with name {1} already exist

trans-unit.source: Invalid version '{0}' passed. Version must be in the format x.x.x.x where x is a number.
trans-unit.target: Invalid version '{0}' passed. Version must be in the format x.x.x.x where x is a number.

trans-unit.source: Streaming query statement contains a reference to missing {0} stream '{1}'. You must add it to the database model.
trans-unit.target: Streaming query statement contains a reference to missing {0} stream '{1}'. You must add it to the database model.

trans-unit.source: Validation for external streaming job '{0}' failed:
trans-unit.target: Validation for external streaming job '{0}' failed:

trans-unit.source: TSQL fragment should contain exactly one batch.
trans-unit.target: TSQL fragment should contain exactly one batch.

trans-unit.source: No External Streaming Job creation TSQL found (EXEC sp_create_streaming_job statement).
trans-unit.target: No External Streaming Job creation TSQL found (EXEC sp_create_streaming_job statement).

trans-unit.source: Failed to find the specified change in the model
trans-unit.target: Failed to find the specified change in the model

trans-unit.source: Error encountered while trying to parse connection information for endpoint '{0}' with error message '{1}'
trans-unit.target: Error encountered while trying to parse connection information for endpoint '{0}' with error message '{1}'

trans-unit.source: Could not find the schema compare session to cancel
trans-unit.target: Could not find the schema compare session to cancel

trans-unit.source: Couldn't find Azure function with FunctionName '{0}' in {1}
trans-unit.target: Couldn't find Azure function with FunctionName '{0}' in {1}

trans-unit.source: More than one Azure function found with the FunctionName '{0}' in {1}
trans-unit.target: More than one Azure function found with the FunctionName '{0}' in {1}

trans-unit.source: Adding SQL bindings is not supported for .NET 5
trans-unit.target: Adding SQL bindings is not supported for .NET 5

trans-unit.source: In most cases, contains the text of the Transact-SQL statement. For rows of type PLAN_ROW, contains a description of the operation.
trans-unit.target: In most cases, contains the text of the Transact-SQL statement. For rows of type PLAN_ROW, contains a description of the operation.

trans-unit.source: Physical implementation algorithm for the node. For rows of type PLAN_ROWS only.
trans-unit.target: Physical implementation algorithm for the node. For rows of type PLAN_ROWS only.

trans-unit.source: Relational algebraic operator this node represents. For rows of type PLAN_ROWS only.
trans-unit.target: Relational algebraic operator this node represents. For rows of type PLAN_ROWS only.

trans-unit.source: Provides supplemental information about the operation being performed. The contents of this column depend on the physical operator.
trans-unit.target: Provides supplemental information about the operation being performed. The contents of this column depend on the physical operator.

trans-unit.source: Type of index for the referenced object.
trans-unit.target: Type of index for the referenced object.

trans-unit.source: Contains a comma-separated list of values introduced by this operator, which may be computed expressions present in the current query, or internal values introduced by the query processor in order to process this query. For rows of type PLAN_ROWS only.
trans-unit.target: Contains a comma-separated list of values introduced by this operator, which may be computed expressions present in the current query, or internal values introduced by the query processor in order to process this query. For rows of type PLAN_ROWS only.

trans-unit.source: Contains a comma-separated list of columns being projected by the current operation.
trans-unit.target: Contains a comma-separated list of columns being projected by the current operation.

trans-unit.source: Contains a comma-separated list of warning messages relating to the current operation. Warning messages may include the string 'NO STATS:()' with a list of columns.
trans-unit.target: Contains a comma-separated list of warning messages relating to the current operation. Warning messages may include the string 'NO STATS:()' with a list of columns.

trans-unit.source: Whether the operator is running in parallel.
trans-unit.target: Whether the operator is running in parallel.

trans-unit.source: Estimated Number of Rows Per Execution
trans-unit.target: Estimated Number of Rows Per Execution
trans-unit.note: Estimated Number of Rows Per Execution

trans-unit.source: Estimated number of rows per execution output by this operator. This is for PLAN_ROWS only.
trans-unit.target: Estimated number of rows per execution output by this operator. This is for PLAN_ROWS only.
trans-unit.note: Estimated Number of Rows Per Execution description

trans-unit.source: Estimated Number of Rows for All Executions
trans-unit.target: Estimated Number of Rows for All Executions
trans-unit.note: Estimated Number of Rows for All Executions

trans-unit.source: Estimated number of rows for all executions output by this operator. This is for PLAN_ROWS only.
trans-unit.target: Estimated number of rows for all executions output by this operator. This is for PLAN_ROWS only.
trans-unit.note: Estimated Number of Rows for All Executions description

trans-unit.source: Estimated Number of Rows to be Read
trans-unit.target: Estimated Number of Rows to be Read

trans-unit.source: Number of rows estimated to be read by this operator. This value may differ from "Estimated Number of Rows for All Executions" if the operator has a predicate.
trans-unit.target: Number of rows estimated to be read by this operator. This value may differ from "Estimated Number of Rows for All Executions" if the operator has a predicate.

trans-unit.source: Whether the sequence represents a GraphDB transitive closure.
trans-unit.target: Whether the sequence represents a GraphDB transitive closure.

trans-unit.source: Whether the operator is interleaved executed.
trans-unit.target: Whether the operator is interleaved executed.

trans-unit.source: If this is an adaptive operator, the cardinality at which it adapts.
trans-unit.target: If this is an adaptive operator, the cardinality at which it adapts.

trans-unit.source: The join type (nested loops or hash join) estimated by the query optimizer before adapting.
trans-unit.target: The join type (nested loops or hash join) estimated by the query optimizer before adapting.

trans-unit.source: The actual join picked (nested loops or hash join) as part of adaptive join execution.
trans-unit.target: The actual join picked (nested loops or hash join) as part of adaptive join execution.

trans-unit.source: Estimated average row size of the row being passed through this operator.
trans-unit.target: Estimated average row size of the row being passed through this operator.

trans-unit.source: Estimated I/O cost for this operator. For rows of type PLAN_ROWS only.
trans-unit.target: Estimated I/O cost for this operator. For rows of type PLAN_ROWS only.

trans-unit.source: Estimated CPU cost for this operator. For rows of type PLAN_ROWS only.
trans-unit.target: Estimated CPU cost for this operator. For rows of type PLAN_ROWS only.

trans-unit.source: Estimated number of times this operator will be executed while running the current query.
trans-unit.target: Estimated number of times this operator will be executed while running the current query.

trans-unit.source: Estimated cumulative cost of this operation and all child operations.
trans-unit.target: Estimated cumulative cost of this operation and all child operations.

trans-unit.source: Actual Number of Rows for All Executions
trans-unit.target: Actual Number of Rows for All Executions

trans-unit.source: Actual number of rows for All Executions output by this operator. For rows of type PLAN_ROWS only.
trans-unit.target: Actual number of rows for All Executions output by this operator. For rows of type PLAN_ROWS only.

trans-unit.note: Number of Rows Read by a Rowset (Table or Index)

trans-unit.source: Number of rows read from a table or an index prior to applying a predicate filter. For rows of type PLAN_ROWS only.
trans-unit.target: Number of rows read from a table or an index prior to applying a predicate filter. For rows of type PLAN_ROWS only.
trans-unit.note: Number of Rows Read by a Rowset (Table or Index) Description

trans-unit.source: Actual number of Batches output by this operator.
trans-unit.target: Actual number of Batches output by this operator.

trans-unit.source: Number of times this operator will be executed while running the current query.
trans-unit.target: Number of times this operator will be executed while running the current query.

trans-unit.source: Estimated data size of the data being passed through this operator.
trans-unit.target: Estimated data size of the data being passed through this operator.

trans-unit.source: The group sets list. Each Value is a reverse bit map for the grouping columns in Group By property.

trans-unit.source: Whether the operation is on a partitioned table or index.
trans-unit.target: Whether the operation is on a partitioned table or index.

trans-unit.source: Keys used by a seek operation.
trans-unit.target: Keys used by a seek operation.

trans-unit.source: Direction of the scan operation as either forward or backward.

trans-unit.target: Operator used tempdb to spill data during execution

trans-unit.target: Operator used tempdb to spill data during execution with spill level {0}

trans-unit.target: A partial update was converted to a full update because of an online index build

trans-unit.source: Whether this is a computed column.
trans-unit.target: Whether this is a computed column.

trans-unit.note: "Cost: {0} percent" String to format. Parameters: 0 - x (string)

trans-unit.source: Whether the operator uses remote procedure call (RPC) to access remote data.

trans-unit.target: Clones that the operator may access.

trans-unit.source: Execution plan source type can not be recognized.

trans-unit.source: Plan data is not available in XML format. Only plans from SQL Server Yukon can be saved.

Description of a per thread counter
Runtime counter property name. Parameters: 0 - index (int)
Runtime counter property name. Thread on Instance.. Parameters: 0 - thread (int), 1 - instance (int)
Error when displaying show plan properties

trans-unit.source: Zoom level must be an integer value between {0} and {1}.
trans-unit.target: Zoom level must be an integer value between {0} and {1}.
trans-unit.note: Message shown when user enters wrong zoom level. Parameters: 0 - minimum (int), 1 - maximum (int)
Exception thrown when node type is unknown
Exception thrown by show plan when it gets unknown type of cursor plan operation. Parameters: 0 - name (string)
Exception thrown by show plan when it gets unknown statement type

trans-unit.source: The highest level of grouping attributes computed in this rollup.
trans-unit.target: The highest level of grouping attributes computed in this rollup.

trans-unit.source: All levels of grouping attributes computed in this rollup.
trans-unit.target: All levels of grouping attributes computed in this rollup.

trans-unit.source: A level of grouping attributes computed in this rollup.
trans-unit.target: A level of grouping attributes computed in this rollup.

trans-unit.note: Unkown (reused string, unkown operator, or unkown reason, or unknown ...)

trans-unit.source: Groups an insert and delete on the same value into an update within wide update plans.
trans-unit.target: Groups an insert and delete on the same value into an update within wide update plans.

trans-unit.source: Append multiple input tables to form the output table.
trans-unit.target: Append multiple input tables to form the output table.

trans-unit.source: Scan an internal table of constants.
trans-unit.target: Scan an internal table of constants.

trans-unit.source: Export the rows from a local or external table to an external table.
trans-unit.target: Export the rows from a local or external table to an external table.

trans-unit.source: Restricting the set of rows based on a predicate.
trans-unit.target: Restricting the set of rows based on a predicate.

trans-unit.source: Used to verify that a specified condition exists.
trans-unit.target: Used to verify that a specified condition exists.

trans-unit.source: Use each row from the top input to build a hash table, and each row from the bottom input to probe into the hash table, outputting all matching rows.
trans-unit.target: Use each row from the top input to build a hash table, and each row from the bottom input to probe into the hash table, outputting all matching rows.

trans-unit.source: A contributor among multiple cooperating hashing operations.
trans-unit.target: A contributor among multiple cooperating hashing operations.

trans-unit.source: The root member of a team of connected hash operators sharing a common hash function and partitioning strategy.
trans-unit.target: The root member of a team of connected hash operators sharing a common hash function and partitioning strategy.

trans-unit.source: Use a Bookmark (RID or clustering key) to look up the corresponding row in the table or clustered index.
trans-unit.target: Use a Bookmark (RID or clustering key) to look up the corresponding row in the table or clustered index.

trans-unit.source: Scan the rows in the log.
trans-unit.target: Scan the rows in the log.

trans-unit.source: Match rows from two suitably sorted input tables exploiting their sort order.
trans-unit.target: Match rows from two suitably sorted input tables exploiting their sort order.

trans-unit.source: For each row in the top (outer) input, scan the bottom (inner) input, and output matching rows.
trans-unit.target: For each row in the top (outer) input, scan the bottom (inner) input, and output matching rows.

trans-unit.source: Compute new values from existing values in a row.
trans-unit.target: Compute new values from existing values in a row.

trans-unit.source: Creates a computed column with the rank of the values in an existing column in the table.
trans-unit.target: Creates a computed column with the rank of the values in an existing column in the table.

trans-unit.source: Stores the data from the input into a temporary table in order to optimize rewinds.
trans-unit.target: Stores the data from the input into a temporary table in order to optimize rewinds.

trans-unit.source: Process each input, in sequence from top to bottom.
trans-unit.target: Process each input, in sequence from top to bottom.

trans-unit.source: Adds columns to perform computations over an ordered set.
trans-unit.target: Adds columns to perform computations over an ordered set.

trans-unit.source: Compute summary values for groups of rows in a suitably sorted stream.
trans-unit.target: Compute summary values for groups of rows in a suitably sorted stream.

trans-unit.source: Scanning a clustered index, entirely or only a range.
trans-unit.target: Scanning a clustered index, entirely or only a range.

trans-unit.source: Scanning a particular range of rows from a clustered index.
trans-unit.target: Scanning a particular range of rows from a clustered index.

trans-unit.source: Scanning the pseudo-table 'deleted' within a trigger.
trans-unit.target: Scanning the pseudo-table 'deleted' within a trigger.

trans-unit.source: Scan the pseudo-table 'inserted' within a trigger.
trans-unit.target: Scan the pseudo-table 'inserted' within a trigger.

trans-unit.source: Scan an internal table of parameter values.
trans-unit.target: Scan an internal table of parameter values.

trans-unit.source: Scan a nonclustered index, entirely or only a range.
trans-unit.target: Scan a nonclustered index, entirely or only a range.

trans-unit.source: Scan a particular range of rows from a nonclustered index.
trans-unit.target: Scan a particular range of rows from a nonclustered index.

trans-unit.source: Scan a columnstore index, entirely or only a range.
trans-unit.target: Scan a columnstore index, entirely or only a range.

trans-unit.target: Update rows in a columnstore index.

trans-unit.target: Delete rows from a columnstore index.

trans-unit.source: Scan rows in a table stored in a database or file other than the current database server.
trans-unit.target: Scan rows in a table stored in a database or file other than the current database server.

trans-unit.source: Scan an index stored in a database or file other than the current database server.
trans-unit.target: Scan an index stored in a database or file other than the current database server.

trans-unit.source: Scan a particular range of rows from a clustered index that is stored in a database or file other than the current database server.
trans-unit.target: Scan a particular range of rows from a clustered index that is stored in a database or file other than the current database server.

trans-unit.source: Send a SQL query to another than the current SQL Server.
trans-unit.target: Send a SQL query to another than the current SQL Server.

trans-unit.source: Insert rows into a table stored in a database or file other than the current database server.
trans-unit.target: Insert rows into a table stored in a database or file other than the current database server.

trans-unit.source: Stores the data from the input into a temporary table in order to optimize rewinds.
trans-unit.target: Stores the data from the input into a temporary table in order to optimize rewinds.

trans-unit.source: Reformats the data from the input into a temporary index, which is then used for seeking with the supplied seek predicate.
trans-unit.target: Reformats the data from the input into a temporary index, which is then used for seeking with the supplied seek predicate.

trans-unit.target: Select the first few rows based on a sort order.

trans-unit.source: Calculates an expression containing SUM, COUNT, MIN, MAX, or AVG.

trans-unit.source: Computes a new value from existing values in a row.
trans-unit.target: Computes a new value from existing values in a row.

trans-unit.source: Removes the specified rows from the specified table.
trans-unit.target: Removes the specified rows from the specified table.

trans-unit.source: Fetching a full row from a heap or a clustered index.
trans-unit.target: Fetching a full row from a heap or a clustered index.

trans-unit.source: Saving temporarily an intermediate query result.
trans-unit.target: Saving temporarily an intermediate query result.

trans-unit.source: Modify the values in the specified table.

trans-unit.source: Implicit or explicit conversion of one scalar datatype to another.
trans-unit.target: Implicit or explicit conversion of one scalar datatype to another.

trans-unit.source: Conditional processing based on an expression.
trans-unit.target: Conditional processing based on an expression.

trans-unit.source: Cursor that can see all changes made by others.
trans-unit.target: Cursor that can see all changes made by others.

trans-unit.source: The query used to retrieve rows when a fetch is issued against a cursor.
trans-unit.target: The query used to retrieve rows when a fetch is issued against a cursor.

trans-unit.source: Cursor that can see updates made by others, but not inserts.
trans-unit.target: Cursor that can see updates made by others, but not inserts.

trans-unit.source: The query used to populate a cursor's work table when the cursor is opened.
trans-unit.target: The query used to populate a cursor's work table when the cursor is opened.

trans-unit.source: Fetches current data for rows in fetch buffer.
trans-unit.target: Fetches current data for rows in fetch buffer.

trans-unit.source: A cursor that does not see changes made by others.
trans-unit.target: A cursor that does not see changes made by others.

trans-unit.source: Uses a supplied clustering key to lookup on a table that has a clustered index.
trans-unit.target: Uses a supplied clustering key to lookup on a table that has a clustered index.

trans-unit.source: Chooses dynamically between hash join and nested loops.
trans-unit.target: Chooses dynamically between hash join and nested loops.

trans-unit.source: Checks referential integrity of the delete operation.
trans-unit.target: Checks referential integrity of the delete operation.

trans-unit.target: Data flow from compute nodes to control node.

trans-unit.source: Data flow from control node to compute nodes.
trans-unit.target: Data flow from control node to compute nodes.

trans-unit.target: Broadcast data movement for external table.

trans-unit.source: Export data movement for external table.
trans-unit.target: Export data movement for external table.

trans-unit.source: Streaming data movement between external table and local table.
trans-unit.target: Streaming data movement between external table and local table.

trans-unit.target: RoundRobin data movement for external table.

trans-unit.target: Shuffle data movement for external table.

trans-unit.source: This represents a ROLLUP operator or a CUBE operator.
trans-unit.target: This represents a ROLLUP operator or a CUBE operator.

trans-unit.note: Format for name / value pair - {0} is property name, {1} is property value. Parameters: 0 - name (string), 1 - value (string)
display string for the operator cost property - 0.###### - is the float number format specifier. Parameters: 0 - cost (double), 1 - percentage (int)
"Missing Index (Impact {0}): {1}" format string for showplan. Parameters: 0 - impact (string), 1 - queryText (string)
title of missing index details. Parameters: 0 - fileName (string), 1 - impact (string)
tooltip text for node warning overlay
tooltip text for node parallelism overlay

trans-unit.source: Could not find SQL model from project: {0}.
trans-unit.target: Could not find SQL model from project: {0}.

trans-unit.source: Failed to get user defined objects from model.
trans-unit.target: Failed to get user defined objects from model.

trans-unit.source: The connection could not be found
trans-unit.target: The connection could not be found

trans-unit.source: The object could not be renamed. URN: '{0}'.
trans-unit.target: The object could not be renamed. URN: '{0}'.

trans-unit.source: Reset password for the login while unlocking.
trans-unit.target: Reset password for the login while unlocking.

trans-unit.source: View any column encryption key definition
trans-unit.target: View any column encryption key definition

trans-unit.source: View any column master key definition
trans-unit.target: View any column master key definition

trans-unit.source: SetServiceProvider() was not called to establish the required service provider
trans-unit.target: SetServiceProvider() was not called to establish the required service provider

trans-unit.source: Service {0} was not found in the service provider
trans-unit.target: Service {0} was not found in the service provider

trans-unit.source: Database properties cannot be set or viewed for databases in 6.0 or 6.5 compatibility mode.
trans-unit.target: Database properties cannot be set or viewed for databases in 6.0 or 6.5 compatibility mode.

trans-unit.source: You cannot modify the path for existing database files.
trans-unit.target: You cannot modify the path for existing database files.

trans-unit.source: There is already a database named "{0}" on the server.
trans-unit.target: There is already a database named "{0}" on the server.

trans-unit.source: File name was empty. Provide a file name for the file.
trans-unit.target: File name was empty. Provide a file name for the file.

trans-unit.source: Cannot create a file with name '{0}' because it contains the invalid character '{1}'.
trans-unit.target: Cannot create a file with name '{0}' because it contains the invalid character '{1}'.

trans-unit.source: Cannot create a file with name '{0}' because it begins with a space character.
trans-unit.target: Cannot create a file with name '{0}' because it begins with a space character.

trans-unit.source: A database name cannot consist of all whitespace characters.
trans-unit.target: A database name cannot consist of all whitespace characters.

trans-unit.source: To change the database properties, SQL Server must close all other connections to the database. Are you sure you want to change the properties and close all other connections?
trans-unit.target: To change the database properties, SQL Server must close all other connections to the database. Are you sure you want to change the properties and close all other connections?

trans-unit.source: For the distribution policy HASH, the number of leading hash columns is optional but should be from 1 to 16 columns
trans-unit.target: For the distribution policy HASH, the number of leading hash columns is optional but should be from 1 to 16 columns

trans-unit.source: Invalid value for Database Schema Provider: '{0}'; expected to be in the form 'Microsoft.Data.Tools.Schema.Sql.SqlAzureV12DatabaseSchemaProvider'.
trans-unit.target: Invalid value for Database Schema Provider: '{0}'; expected to be in the form 'Microsoft.Data.Tools.Schema.Sql.SqlAzureV12DatabaseSchemaProvider'.

trans-unit.source: The length of time (in seconds) to wait for a connection to the server before terminating the attempt and generating an error
trans-unit.target: The length of time (in seconds) to wait for a connection to the server before terminating the attempt and generating an error

trans-unit.source: The length of time (in seconds) to wait for a command to complete on the server before terminating the attempt and generating an error
trans-unit.target: The length of time (in seconds) to wait for a command to complete on the server before terminating the attempt and generating an error

trans-unit.source: Enables or disables Secure Enclaves for the connection
trans-unit.target: Enables or disables Secure Enclaves for the connection

trans-unit.source: If your application is connecting to an AlwaysOn availability group (AG) on different subnets, setting this to true provides faster detection of and connection to the (currently) active server.
trans-unit.target: If your application is connecting to an AlwaysOn availability group (AG) on different subnets, setting this to true provides faster detection of and connection to the (currently) active server.
